title: At the Doctor
description: A fever and some good advice.

panels.speaker: doctor
panels.hindi: Aaiye, baithiye. Kahiye, kya takleef hai?
panels.english: Come in, sit down. Tell me, what's the trouble?
panels.pronunciation: AA-i-ye, BAI-thi-ye. KA-hi-ye, kya tak-LEEF hai?

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Doctor sahab, do din se bukhar hai aur gala kharab hai.
panels.english: Doctor, I've had a fever for two days and a sore throat.
panels.pronunciation: DOC-tor SA-hab, DO din se bu-KHAR hai aur GA-la kha-RAB hai

panels.speaker: doctor
panels.hindi: Aapko aaram chahiye. Khoob paani piyiye aur garam haldi-doodh lijiye.
panels.english: You need rest. Drink plenty of water and have warm turmeric milk.
panels.pronunciation: AAP-ko aa-RAM cha-HI-ye. KHOOB PAA-ni PI-yi-ye aur ga-RAM HAL-di-doodh LI-ji-ye

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Theek hai, doctor sahab. Kya koi dawa bhi leni hogi?
panels.english: Okay, doctor. Will I need to take any medicine too?
panels.pronunciation: THEEK hai, DOC-tor SA-hab. kya KO-i DA-wa bhi LE-ni HO-gi?

panels.speaker: doctor
panels.hindi: Abhi nahi. Aaram sabse achhi dawa hai.
panels.english: Not yet. Rest is the best medicine.
panels.pronunciation: a-BHI na-HEE. aa-RAM SAB-se ACH-chi DA-wa hai
